summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Ayurita B2B water website. 32/32 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend e2e flows validated: homepage sections, products listing (10 products), product detail + add-to-cart, cart → checkout → coupon (AYURITA10) apply → place order (redirected to /order-success/AYU-...), order tracking, bulk-order form submit, contact form submit, About/Categories pages, admin login (admin@ayurita.com), admin route protection (unauth /admin → /admin/login), admin dashboard (stats + revenue chart + top products + recent orders), and all admin sub-pages (Orders, Products, Categories, Bulk Inquiries, Contact Messages, Coupons) load successfully.

issues: Recharts logs benign warnings 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on initial mount before ResponsiveContainer measures the wrapper. Cosmetic, not visually broken.

action_items: (Optional) Suppress or fix the Recharts ResponsiveContainer initial-mount width/height warnings on Admin Dashboard by explicitly setting minWidth/minHeight or aspect on the ResponsiveContainer wrappers.

(Optional) Confirm that clicking the admin-logout button also redirects the router to /admin/login immediately; currently localStorage token is cleared and setAdmin(null) is invoked, but URL may remain on the previous admin route until next navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth uses JWT via Authorization header (as documented). get_current_admin also accepts httpOnly cookie 'access_token' but login endpoint only returns token in JSON — cookie path is dormant and safe.

CORS_ORIGINS in backend/.env is '*' with allow_credentials=True — this combination is disallowed by browsers when credentials are used. Not currently affecting the app because frontend uses Bearer tokens only, but should be tightened to an explicit origin list before production.
seed() runs on every startup and idempotently keeps admin password aligned with ADMIN_PASSWORD env — good.

Order totals: bulk_price kicks in only when quantity >= moq*10 (e.g. 500ml MOQ=24 → bulk requires 240 units). This threshold seems high; product-detail UI may not reflect this rule clearly to end users.
server.py is 772 lines — consider splitting into routers/modules (auth, products, orders, admin, analytics) for maintainability.
No rate-limiting or brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login — recommended for production.
MongoDB _id is properly excluded ({'_id': 0}) in all read queries — good.
GET /api/coupons/validate returns 400 with a message containing the min order, but the min-order comparison for coupon expiry uses a naive datetime — expires_at parsing is tolerant.
PUT /api/admin/contact-messages/{msg_id}/status takes status as a query param instead of a JSON body — inconsistent with other endpoints; still functional.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@ayurita.com / Ayurita@2026 (verified working). Coupon AYURITA10 (10% off, min ₹500) verified.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during run: TEST_Biz orders (4), TEST_Hotel bulk inquiry (1), TEST user contact message (1). Admin CRUD tests self-cleanup coupon/category/product records they create.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend runs on supervisor at /api. All 32 pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py pass. Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from .env, JWT stored in localStorage as 'ayurita_token', sent as Authorization: Bearer. Public cards use slug-suffixed testids: [data-testid^='product-card-'] and [data-testid^='category-card-']. Admin order drawer opens via [data-testid='view-order-{order_number}'] button (Eye icon), not row click.
rca_of_issues: No critical issues found. Recharts warnings are known cosmetic behavior when ResponsiveContainer mounts before layout — no functional impact.
